name: Sendcloud
summary: Ship through more than 100 carriers with Sendcloud. Print labels straight from ShopLinkr and push tracking back to your channels.
about: Sendcloud is a shipping platform for webshops that automates and streamlines the shipping process. It offers integrations with more than 100 carriers, such as PostNL, DHL and DPD, and supports a wide range of shop systems. With Sendcloud you can easily create shipping labels, share tracking information and manage returns, which saves time and cuts costs.

faqs.q: Are address details added to the shipping label automatically?
faqs.a: Yes, based on an order's shipping details we request a shipping label from Sendcloud. You can adjust the address details manually if needed.
